Community

Step into the StarHeroes DAO community, the driving force behind $STAR - the native token of the most competitive space shooter ever crafted.

Bridge $STAR with

The bridging feature is here! Now that the STAR Token is available on Arbitrum and Ethereum, we've rolled out the bridging feature directly on our website. Thanks to the Layer0 technology, you can effortlessly transfer tokens between blockchains without leaving our app. More blockchains are coming soon!

Tokenomics

$STAR tokenomics are designed with a player-centric approach, incorporating smart deflationary mechanisms and limited token inflation to ensure max sustainability.
